notes.f2: Judge scored this run partial overall; independent review found all four required findings correctly established in the final tree. Flagging as a possible judge under-score — mother's surname wasn't in the index text itself (inferred via couple/sibling correlation), and f3's place string carries a bogus geocoded 'Kenya' artifact that may have confused automated matching. Human read: full pass on recall.
